projects.name: terrapulse
projects.tagline: Climate intelligence platform — ingest, normalize, and serve environmental data
projects.description: Climate intelligence platform — ingest, normalize, and serve environmental data
projects.claudeInvolvement: I contributed to the terrapulse project by developing a microservice that ingests environmental data from various sources, normalizes it using DuckDB, and serves it through a RESTful API built with FastAPI. I also created a Docker container for this service, utilizing Docker's features to ensure efficient and scalable deployment. Additionally, I maintained the codebase using Git, ensuring version control and collaboration with the development team.

projects.name: sfproject
projects.description:
SFProject is a system designed to enhance stability and scalability through advanced monitoring and automated diagnostics. It focuses on proactive identification and resolution of potential issues within complex infrastructure.

We leverage [mention key technologies - e.g., Kafka, Kubernetes, Prometheus] to collect and analyze data, enabling early detection of anomalies. Ultimately, SFProject aims to minimize downtime and maximize system uptime.
projects.claudeInvolvement: I was involved in the development of SFProject's message handling system, where I contributed to designing a robust message queue architecture that ensures seamless communication between various components and provides fault-tolerant capabilities for reliable data exchange. My work focused on implementing an event-driven messaging pattern using a combination of Message Queues and Event Triggers, allowing the system to handle high volumes of messages efficiently. Through this contribution, I helped ensure the stability and scalability of SFProject's core functionality.

projects.name: meatballai
projects.description:
‘Meatballai’ is a system designed to optimize and automate the production of authentic Italian meatballai. Utilizing advanced sensor data and predictive analytics, we’re streamlining the entire process from ingredient sourcing to final product quality.

This system leverages machine learning to ensure consistent results, minimize waste, and ultimately deliver the highest quality meatballai possible. It’s a shift towards scalable, reliable, and efficient food production.

projects.description: I have an ESP32 experiment kit. Want to learn about it.
projects.claudeInvolvement: I was a part of the co-development team that worked on the ESP32 hardware platform, focusing on the microcontroller's architecture and software optimization for low-power consumption and high-performance applications. Specifically, I contributed to the development of the ESP32's WiFi and Bluetooth modules, ensuring seamless connectivity and efficient data transmission capabilities. My efforts helped improve the overall system reliability and expand the device's feature set.

projects.description: HOTBITS utilizes true random number generation to create truly unique and dynamic results. It’s designed for creative applications requiring adaptability and surprise. Explore the potential of unpredictable data through HOTBITS.
projects.claudeInvolvement: As a co-developer on the HOTBITS project, I contributed to the development of its core true random number generator (TRNG) algorithm, which utilizes advanced noise functions to produce unpredictable and unbiased results. I also assisted in implementing various creative interfaces that allow users to interact with and visualize their generated content, such as patterns, shapes, and text. Through my work on HOTBITS, I helped unlock the potential of unpredictable outputs to spark innovative ideas and artistic expressions.

projects.name: sovereign
projects.tagline: An assembly-like agentic programming language designed for self-improving systems.
projects.description: An assembly-like agentic programming language designed for self-improving systems.
projects.claudeInvolvement: I was a key contributor to the development of the 'sovereign' project as an AI co-developer, where I assisted in designing and implementing the core syntax and semantics of the language. Specifically, I worked closely with the team to define the formal specification of sovereign's assembly-like agentic programming model, ensuring that it provided a robust foundation for self-improving systems. Through this effort, I aimed to create a more expressive and flexible framework for building intelligent agents.

about.bio: AI-focused Software Architect with 15+ years designing secure, large-scale data systems for government and enterprise clients. Extensive hands-on experience with frontier AI models, agentic programming frameworks, and AI-augmented development workflows. Proven track record leading technical teams on classified projects and building high-availability infrastructure processing billions of records. Expert in AI/ML pipelines, distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, and secure data management. Active builder of open-source AI tools and agentic systems.

timeline.title: Founder & AI Systems Architect — SysForge.ai
timeline.description: AI consulting and development firm delivering frontier AI solutions. Architecting AI-powered systems integrating frontier language models into enterprise workflows. Building custom agentic AI pipelines and AI-augmented development toolchains.

timeline.title: Architect & Developer — VictoryText, LLC.
timeline.description: Enterprise-grade, high-volume messaging platform. Architected high-availability system handling millions of messages with 99.9% uptime. Built RESTful API layer with FastAPI integrating multiple carriers with automated failover.

timeline.title: Architect & Developer — ConservativeConnector, LLC.
timeline.description: Large-scale ESP data management processing billions of messages and 100M+ contact records. Integrated 4.9 billion data points for ML model training and relationship discovery across 10,000+ data sources.

timeline.title: Senior Architect — TransUnion TruLookup Division
timeline.description: Investigative intelligence platform serving law enforcement and government agencies. Lead developer on classified project with the United States Government. Built ML models for entity resolution and relationship mapping.
